{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Iron eyes
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron eyes]] can pick out small groups on the horizon.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
